title: 命运齿轮FOM【Fate's Machinery】
description:
轻量级机械动力整合包，基于最新NeoForge优化，专注自动化玩法，流畅低耗。

Lightweight Create modpack on NeoForge, optimized for smooth automation gameplay.
body:
专为自动化爱好者打造，轻量机械动力整合包，让大家体验圆石生万物，一生二，二生三，三生万物的游戏乐趣。基于最新版 NeoForge，核心玩法为机械动力模组。该整合包经过流畅优化，体积小巧。即使是低配电脑也能畅玩。特点包括：齿轮、传动与自动化功能；保证稳定 60 + FPS；可快速下载安装；且能得到持续更新支持。

It is specially designed for automation enthusiasts. The lightweight mechanical power integration package allows everyone to experience the fun of the game of "round stones produce all things, one becomes two, two become three, and three become all things". Based on the latest version of NeoForge, the core gameplay is mechanical power modules. The integration package has been optimized for smoothness and has a small size. Even low-end computers can play it smoothly. Features include: gear, transmission and automation functions; Guaranteed Stable 60+ FPS; It can be quickly downloaded and installed; And can get continuous update support
